sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29745" key="dwdeka/stegos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δωδεκά-στεγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29745.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with twelve stories</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πύργος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:2:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.18</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
